items.title: Audit Logs and Security
items.description: Understand how AuthHub handles client authorization activity, audit visibility, and the security expectations around platform access workflows.

items.title: Request Expiration Behavior
items.description: Learn how expiration affects access requests, how to recover from expired links, and how to keep agency workflows from stalling.

items.title: Team and Account Basics
items.description: Set expectations for how agency members should work inside AuthHub so access workflows stay attributable and operationally clean.
